player_news.description: Will not return right hip strain

headlines.description: — Desmond Bane scored 21 points, Jalen Suggs added 20 points, eight rebounds and seven assists and the Orlando Magic held off the Phoenix Suns 115-111 Tuesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bane and Suggs power the Magic to a 115-111 victory over the Suns

headlines.description: — Kevin Durant had 27 points and the Houston Rockets took a huge lead early and rolled to a 111-94 win over the New York Knicks on Tuesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Durant scores 27 as the Rockets race to an early lead and rout the Knicks 111-94

headlines.description: — Ryan Rollins had 24 points, seven rebounds and nine assists, Kyle Kuzma added 20 points, and the Milwaukee Bucks beat the Dallas Mavericks 123-99 on Tuesday night to snap a four-game losing streak.
headlines.shortLinkText: Rollins scores 24, Kuzma adds 20 and the Bucks beat Mavericks 123-99 to snap 4-game skid

headlines.description: — Luka Doncic scored 42 points with 12 assists, Deandre Ayton added 18 points with nine rebounds, and the Los Angeles Lakers extended their winning streak to four games with a 127-113 victory over the Cleveland Cavaliers on Tuesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Luka Doncic scores 42 as Lakers blow past Cavaliers 127-113

headlines.description: — Deni Avdija had 28 points, 11 rebounds and eight assists, Jrue Holiday hit seven 3s and finished with 30 points, and the Portland Trail Blazers snapped the Los Angeles Clippers' five-game win streak, 114-104 on Tuesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Holiday scores 30, Avdija adds 28 to help Trail Blazers beat Clippers
